item.title: A Hitchhiker’s Guide to Model-Driven Engineering for Data-Centric Systems
Comparing and classifying model transformation reuse approaches across metamodels
Model-Driven Engineering for Design-Runtime Interaction in Complex Systems: Scientific Challenges and Roadmap
item.description: <!-- authors = ["Hugo Bruneliere", "Romina Eramo", "Abel Gomez", "Valentin Besnard", "Jean-Michel Bruel", "Martin Gogolla", "Andreas Kästner", "Adrian Rutle"] -->

item.title: On the use of models for high-performance scientific computing applications: an experience report
On the Use of Models for High-Performance Scientific Computing Applications: an Experience Report
Joint Proceedings of the 12th Educators Symposium (EduSymp 2016) and 3rd International Workshop on Open Source Software for Model Driven Engineering (OSS4MDE 2016)
